info.title: ArduinoCsCompiler
info.description: This tool is experimental - expect many missing features and that the behavior will change.

commands.name: compile
commands.description:
Compile and optionally upload code to a microcontroller. Further
options allow to debug the uploaded code.

options.name: --entrypoint
options.description:
(Default: Main) Entry point of program. Must be
the name of a static method taking no arguments or
a single string[] array.

options.name: --compileonly
options.description:
(Default: false) Only compile the code, don't
upload. Check whether the code could be used on
the microcontroller, but don't attempt an actual
upload.

options.name: --run
options.description:
(Default: true) Run the program after uploading.
The compiler will switch to execution mode after
upload and run the program, printing any log
output to the console.

options.name: --debug
options.description:
Start the interactive remote debugger after the
program has started.

options.name: --mapfile
options.description: File to store the token map into.

options.name: --keepifcurrent
options.description:
(Default: false) If specified, the program will
not be transmitted if it is already loaded.
Defaults to false, because not all changes might
be caught.

options.name: --culture
options.description:
The name of the culture to use for
'CultureInfo.CurrentCulture'. Must be a valid
culture name such as 'de-CH' or 'Invariant'.
Defaults to the current culture during compile.

options.name: --preview
options.description:
(Default: false) Enable preview features of the
runtime

options.name: --suppress
options.description:
Suppress the given class(es). Removes these
classes (fully qualified names) from the execution
set. Separate by ','

options.name: --port
options.description:
The serial port where the microcontroller is
connected. Defaults to auto-detect.

options.name: --baudrate
options.description:
(Default: 115200) The baudrate to program the
microcontroller.

options.name: --network
options.description:
An IP address to connect to (with optional port
number).

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Output verbose messages.

options.name: --quiet
options.description:
(Default: false) Minimal output only. This is
ignored if -v is specified

options.name: --no-progress
options.description:
(Default: false) Suppress printing progress
messages

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

arguments.name: STARTUPASSEMBLY
arguments.description: Input file/assembly. A dll or exe file

commands.name: exec
commands.description: Provides some direct commands to the board

options.name: --stop
options.description:
(Default: false) Stop execution of any program on the
microcontroller. This may be needed to get it back to a
responsive state

options.name: --port
options.description:
The serial port where the microcontroller is connected.
Defaults to auto-detect.

options.name: --baudrate
options.description:
(Default: 115200) The baudrate to program the
microcontroller.

options.name: --network
options.description: An IP address to connect to (with optional port number).

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Output verbose messages.

options.name: --quiet
options.description:
(Default: false) Minimal output only. This is ignored if -v
is specified

options.name: --no-progress
options.description: (Default: false) Suppress printing progress messages

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.

commands.name: prepare
commands.description: Prepare the Arduino runtime for uploading

options.name: --targetpath
options.description:
Target path for the generated files. Defaults to the
Arduino workspace directory

options.name: --FlashSize
options.description:
Total flash size available. When specified, a matching
partitions.csv file is written. Only relevant for target
ESP32

options.name: --FirmwareSize
options.description:
(Default: 1MiB) Size of the firmware partition. Set this
to a value greater than the reported size by the firmware
compiler. If this value is to small, the firmware
typically won't boot.

options.name: --ProgramSize
options.description: (Default: 1MiB) Size of the partition for the C# code

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Output verbose messages.

options.name: --quiet
options.description:
(Default: false) Minimal output only. This is ignored if
-v is specified

options.name: --no-progress
options.description: (Default: false) Suppress printing progress messages

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
